{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/22666538?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/omkhar", "id": 22666538, "login": "omkhar", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjIyNjY2NTM4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-59888", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-915", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes"}], "description": "## Summary
For Java Records, `POJOPropertiesCollector._removeUnwantedIgnorals()` records a `@JsonIgnore`-annotated component under its original implicit name before `_renameUsing()` applies the `PropertyNamingStrategy`. After the rename, `_ignoredPropertyNames` still holds only the pre-rename name, so `_ignorableProps` is built from the stale key. The renamed JSON key passes `IgnorePropertiesUtil.shouldIgnore()` and is assigned to the Record's constructor parameter, defeating the `@JsonIgnore`.

## Impact
A Record using a naming strategy that relies on `@JsonIgnore` to keep an internal/privileged component out of deserialization can have that component set from the wire via its renamed key (e.g. a role/flag controlled by an untrusted client).

## Affected / Patched (verified via `git tag --contains`)
- 2.15-2.18 line: `>= 2.15.0, < 2.18.8` -> fixed in **2.18.8** (backport `c7c6783`)
- 2.19-2.21 line: `>= 2.19.0, < 2.21.4` -> fixed in **2.21.4**
- 3.x line: `>= 3.0.0, < 3.1.4` -> fixed in **3.1.4** (#5974, `baa2cdf`)

## Severity / CWE
Maintainer: minor. Reporter: Moderate. CWE-915; related CWE-345.

## Credits
Omkhar Arasaratnam (@omkhar) - finder.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00247, "percentile": 0.15892}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3pjw-73gf-8qr5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-21T19:33:06Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3pjw-73gf-8qr5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3pjw-73gf-8qr5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-59888"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-14T17:17:15Z", "published_at": "2026-07-21T19:33:06Z", "references": ["https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/security/advisories/GHSA-3pjw-73gf-8qr5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-59888", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/pull/5974", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/commit/baa2cdf5ca2b2717fbb88d91955d69d8651df3e4", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/commit/c7c678360624da5bc7eed2152789fa522880db9d", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3pjw-73gf-8qr5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/FasterXML/jackson-databind/security-advisories/GHSA-3pjw-73gf-8qr5", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind", "summary": "jackson-databind: @JsonIgnore on a Record property is bypassed with a PropertyNamingStrategy", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-21T19:33:07Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3pjw-73gf-8qr5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.18.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.15.0, < 2.18.8"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.21.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.19.0, < 2.21.4"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.1.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "tools.jackson.core:jackson-databind"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, < 3.1.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: jackson-databind: @JsonIgnore on a Record property is bypassed with a PropertyNamingStrategy
